spec.title: Containers Down
spec.description: Textfile alerting source (docker-metrics.timer), not cAdvisor. Total minus running across all three hosts.

spec.title: Host Memory — Used vs Total
spec.description: Dashed line = physical/assigned total. Gap between used and total = headroom.

spec.title: docker — Container CPU (cores)
spec.description: Absolute cores consumed per container (cAdvisor). Compare the sum against the VM's assigned vCPUs.

spec.title: docker — Container Memory (working set)
spec.description: Working set per container (cAdvisor). Compare the sum against the VM's assigned RAM.
